name: SepTech LLC.
notes: Issues: built on cheap/outdated builder (weebly); very few internal pages (3 — thin site); no contact form found; weak or missing CTA language. Rating: NEEDS_WORK (score 71)

review_snippets.name: Jackie L.
review_snippets.text: Mike was so responsive and came out to my clients property right away. A new septic system needed to be installed.Mike did a great job installing the new system, my clients couldn’t be happier! Highly recommend SepTech.

review_snippets.name: Peter J.
review_snippets.text: Mike is one of the most trustworthy honest hard working and highly skilled people i have ever done business with.  I highly recommend him, he exceeded my expectations for sure!

review_snippets.name: Art K.
review_snippets.text: We have nothing but great things to say about Michael and his company Septech. In the middle of our extensive back yard  renovation it was found that the septic tank needed to be replaced. We were kind of in a time crunch as we needed to seed the lawn. review_snippets.text: Septech is a top notch septic engineering company headed by Mike Borussa who received college degrees in related sciences. review_snippets.name: Sandra M.
review_snippets.text: Mike helped a great deal explaining the situation with my septic tank. He took time, had patience with my lack of knowledge on the subject, and his consultation proved invaluable.
